caption: A man with a goatee and glasses is seated in a studio, wearing a white button-down shirt with suspenders, a red bowtie, and a tall, silver, spiked hairpiece. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a large black microphone. The background consists of walls covered in framed photographs and clothing. A logo is visible on the left side of the screen that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST," and a smaller logo reading "BOSS TALK 101" appears in the center. As the scene progresses, the man remains in the same position, continuing to speak with slight changes in his facial expression and mouth movements. The camera remains static, capturing him from the chest up as he interacts with someone off-camera.
